tools.name: route_ai_task
tools.description: Routes an AI coding task to the optimal execution path (local_llm, claude, or codex) based on complexity, urgency, and context signals. Invokes the selected CLI tool, parses its output, and returns a structured JSON result. Every call is logged to memory/tool-calls.jsonl.

description.description: Natural-language description of the task to route.

prompt.description: Full prompt to send to the selected tool. Defaults to description if omitted.

complexity.description: Estimated task complexity 0–10. Higher = more likely to route to Claude.

file_involvement.description: True if the task involves reading or modifying existing files.

urgency.description: High urgency favours faster tools (local, codex); low favours thoroughness (claude).

decision.description: Full Decision object from the routing engine.

cli_result.description: ToolResult envelope. null when path is local_llm.

parsed.description: ParsedOutput envelope. null when path is local_llm.

error.description: Error message if success=false, else null.
